daysBack.title: Days back
daysBack.description: How many days of Show HN launches to scan (1-30).

minPoints.title: Minimum points
minPoints.description: Discard launches below this many HN points.

minComments.title: Minimum comments
minComments.description: Discard launches below this many comments.

keywords.title: Keyword filter (optional)
keywords.description: Only keep launches whose title matches at least one keyword (case-insensitive). Leave empty for all.

maxResults.title: Max results
maxResults.description: Cap the number of launches returned.
